title: The Violent Ones
writer: Charles Davis, Fred Freiberger, Herman Miller
actors: Fernando Lamas, Aldo Ray, Tommy Sands
plot: When a girl in a town that's populated by Hispanics is attacked, the only thing she says before falling into a coma is that her attacker is an outsider, a Caucasian. So the sheriff arrests the only outsiders there are. All he can ...
